selections.name: Oligarch
selections.reason: Strong favorite dropping slightly in class with consistent high-90s speed figures. Drawn well outside for a clean trip.

selections.name: Two Ducks
selections.reason: Possesses excellent tactical speed and figures that fit perfectly here. Should sit a great trip just off the pace.

selections.name: Hafu
selections.reason: Solid class rating and gets a favorable inside draw to save ground. A logical contender for the exotics.

selections.name: Daw Samaa
selections.reason: Has shown flashes of ability and could clunk up for a minor share if the pace collapses.

danger_horse.name: No Filter
danger_horse.reason: Has back class and could wake up at a price with the right setup.

selections.name: Relaxx (fr)
selections.reason: European import with strong back class and a solid late kick suited for this marathon distance.

selections.name: Protective Custody
selections.reason: Consistent runner who projects to get a favorable stalking trip right behind the early speed.

selections.name: Massarat
selections.reason: Has competitive speed figures and should be saving ground on the rail for a late run.

selections.name: Lady Firefoot
selections.reason: Veteran mare who knows how to win and has the stamina for the 11-furlong trip.

danger_horse.name: Sailaway
danger_horse.reason: Morning line favorite with excellent recent form, very dangerous if she clears early.

selections.name: Ah Ca Ira
selections.reason: Class standout in this field. Will look to establish position early and dominate the stretch run.

selections.name: My First Love
selections.reason: Has been knocking on the door in similar spots and gets a good mid-pack draw.

selections.name: Miss Lao
selections.reason: Drawn outside, which is favorable here. Can stalk the pace and pounce late.

selections.name: Whistler's Style
selections.reason: Consistent underneath type who rarely runs a bad race at this level.

danger_horse.name: Luna Moth
danger_horse.reason: Capable of popping a big figure on her best day; dangerous if left alone.

selections.name: Ohonte's Own
selections.reason: Strong favorite with excellent speed figures and a prime outside draw to stay out of trouble.

selections.name: Emotionlyavailble
selections.reason: Has shown good early foot and should be prominent from the inside post.

selections.name: Twirling Lad
selections.reason: Rail draw is tricky, but has the talent to hit the board if he finds racing room.

selections.name: High Leverage
selections.reason: Has flashed high speed figures in the past and could be a value play underneath.

danger_horse.name: Lobbyist
danger_horse.reason: Late runner who could pick up the pieces if the pace gets too hot up front.

selections.name: First Site
selections.reason: Showed good speed in debut and should move forward significantly second time out.

selections.name: Mitoleon Dynamite
selections.reason: First-time starter with strong works and a favorable mid-pack draw.

selections.name: Miss Ma'am
selections.reason: Well-bred debut runner who could flash early speed from the rail.

selections.name: Ms Liu
selections.reason: Another intriguing first-timer who has shown enough in the mornings to warrant respect.

danger_horse.name: Nashoba
danger_horse.reason: Has race experience and an outside draw, which is a huge plus in these sprints.

selections.name: Adrian
selections.reason: Classy runner who fits this condition perfectly. Should get a ground-saving trip and finish strong.

selections.name: Sarir
selections.reason: Consistent speed figures and a good post make her a major threat to the top pick.

selections.name: Beira
selections.reason: Has tactical speed to stay close and could get first run on the closers.

selections.name: Higher Force
selections.reason: Outside draw is ideal for her stalking style; should be in the mix late.

danger_horse.name: Racing Colors
danger_horse.reason: Capable of a late surge if the pace is contested.

selections.name: Rare Society
selections.reason: Strong recent form and speed figures make her the one to beat in this spot.

selections.name: Undergrad
selections.reason: Drawn well outside and should get a clean, unimpeded run at the leaders.

selections.name: Nightscope
selections.reason: Has tactical speed and can sit a perfect trip just behind the early duel.

selections.name: Tree House
selections.reason: Rail draw is tough, but she has the class to hit the board if she breaks well.

danger_horse.name: Will Of A Womanne
danger_horse.reason: Could offer value underneath with a favorable pace setup.

selections.name: Mommy's Turn
selections.reason: Top connections and excellent recent turf figures make her a standout.

selections.name: Downtown Channel
selections.reason: Consistent performer who should get a great stalking trip from the middle of the gate.

selections.name: Nonna Lynne
selections.reason: Has the class and outside draw to stay out of trouble and make a strong late run.

selections.name: Sail With The Wind
selections.reason: Solid turf pedigree and figures suggest she belongs in the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Sweet Montreal
danger_horse.reason: Has flashed massive speed figures in the past; very dangerous if she replicates her best.

selections.name: Blue Authenticity
selections.reason: Showed promise in debut and should improve second time out with a good draw.

selections.name: Daylight Dreamer
selections.reason: Outside post is favorable in these turf sprints; has the speed to contend early.

selections.name: Aperitif
selections.reason: Has run well in similar spots and gets a good inside draw to save ground.

selections.name: Midtown Mischief
selections.reason: Solid works and connections suggest she will be ready for a good effort.

danger_horse.name: Island Charm
danger_horse.reason: Must overcome the far outside post, but has the tactical speed to do so.
